name: queens-feature-delivery
description: "Deliver a Queens gameplay feature end-to-end in this repo. Use for implementing a game improvement in index.html with validation and release-ready notes."
argument-hint: "Describe the feature, UX intent, and success criteria."
user-invocable: true
---
# Queens Feature Delivery

Use this skill when adding or refining gameplay features for the King Max puzzle.

## Procedure
1. Clarify scope, constraints, and acceptance criteria.
2. Implement minimal focused changes in `index.html`.
3. Validate gameplay paths manually:
- New game
- Clear
- Hint
- Difficulty search
- Win condition
4. Summarize behavior changes and any risks.
5. Provide a short release note draft.

## Definition Of Done
- [Feature DoD](./references/definition-of-done.md)
